steps.title: Compare intercepts
steps.content: The line of best fit crosses the $y$-axis near $30$, so a model with no constant term is not appropriate.

steps.title: Compare slopes
steps.content: The data trend rises by about $15$ units in $y$ for each $1$ unit increase in $x$, not by about $0.76$. The model $y=30.38+15.12x$ has both the right intercept and slope. The answer is A.
